ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Update – New Deals Inside!
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

We hope you enjoyed last week’s promotions. This week, we’re excited to share exclusive offers on our top‑selling products, plus a sneak peek at upcoming releases.

• 20% off on all electronics – limited time only.
• Free shipping on orders over $75.
• Early access to our Summer Collection – arrive before anyone else.

To take advantage of these deals, simply click the link below (or visit our website) and use code WEEKLY20 at checkout.

Thank you for being a loyal member of our community.

Best regards,
The Marketing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Request
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

This is CEO John Smith. I need your help with an urgent matter. I was approached by a vendor who requires a $500 gift card to cover an unexpected expense. I am unable to access the corporate credit line at the moment, so I am asking you to process the purchase on my behalf.

Please send the gift card to the following email address: <URL> and confirm once the transaction is complete. I will reimburse the amount from my personal account.

Time is of the essence – I need this done before the end of the day. Thank you for your immediate attention.

Best,
John
